arts.ttl: Die Nationalelf vs the Azzurri: Germany's top 5 clashes with Italy
arts.sum: As Germany get ready to do battle with age-old rivals Italy in the UEFA Nations League quarter-finals on 20 and 23 March, bundesliga.com takes a look at the top 5 clashes between two nations who boast some of the proudest pedigrees in world football. As reigning world champions heading into this first major tournament since their resounding success in Brazil in 2014, Germany may have enjoyed favourite status in this quarter-final clash, but it was far from a walk in the park for Joachim Löw's side.

arts.sum: Toni Kroos is back in the football business as a shareholder in his former agency Sports360. Football agency Sports360 has announced that the German has become a shareholder.

arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano Transfer News: Real Madrid DONE DEAL, Liverpool move CONFIRMED, Huijsen, Wirtz EYED
arts.sum: Fabrizio Romano Transfer News: Real Madrid DONE DEAL, Liverpool move CONFIRMED, Huijsen, Wirtz EYED "Not expected to sign a new deal and expected potentially to leave in the summer is Dean Huijsen, another fantastic centre-back, another top talent, another Spanish player, in this case playing for Bournemouth, sold by Juventus in the summer.
